data.headline: Buy or Sell with Confidence
data.body: I'm Jenise Buckalew, a NJ State Licensed REALTOR® and independent agent with Green Light Realty LLC. With over 100 homes sold across 20 years in the business, I deliver results — whether you're selling your home for top dollar or searching for the perfect place to call home. Selling? I'll start with a free, instant Comparative Market Analysis so you know exactly what your home is worth. Buying? Tell me what you're looking for and I'll find it.
data.cta_text: Get Your Free Home Value Report in Minutes

data.title: What I Bring to the Table
data.subtitle: Every client gets the full package — no cutting corners.

items.title: Free Home Value Report in Minutes
items.description: Submit your info and get a personalized Home Value Report within minutes — so you know exactly what your home is worth before we even meet.

items.title: Professional Photography
items.description: Every listing gets high-quality, professionally shot photos that make buyers stop scrolling and start scheduling showings.

items.title: Strategic Pricing
items.description: Data-driven pricing backed by real comparable sales in your neighborhood — priced to attract serious offers fast.

items.title: Home Prep Guidance
items.description: I'll walk through your home and tell you exactly what small changes can boost your sale price — no expensive renovations needed.

items.title: Maximum Exposure
items.description: Your home gets listed on the MLS, Zillow, Realtor.com, social media, and more — seen by thousands of active buyers.

items.title: Personalized Home Search
items.description: Looking for a home? Tell me your must-haves — area, price range, bedrooms — and I'll send you listings that match, before they hit the public market.

items.title: Se Habla Español
items.description: Bilingual service in English and Spanish so every client feels heard, understood, and confident throughout the process.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three simple steps to get started.

steps.title: Submit Your Info
steps.description: Fill out the quick form below with your property details. It takes less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: Get Your Free Home Value Report
steps.description: Selling your home? I'll send you a personalized Home Value Report within minutes showing what your home is worth based on recent comparable sales. Buying? I'll reach out to learn more about what you're looking for.

steps.title: Schedule a Walkthrough
steps.description: I'll visit your home in person to give you the most accurate price based on your upgrades and unique features.

data.title: What My Clients Say

items.text: Jenise was absolutely amazing throughout the entire process. She was always available, incredibly knowledgeable, and made everything so easy. I couldn't have asked for a better experience!
Jenise is a fantastic realtor! She guided us through every step and was always patient with our questions. Her expertise made our home sale smooth and stress-free.
Working with Jenise was the best decision we made. She is professional, responsive, and truly cares about her clients. She sold our home fast and for a great price!
Jenise went above and beyond for us. She was there every step of the way and made the whole process seamless. Highly recommend her to anyone buying or selling!

data.title: Ready to Make a Move?
data.subtitle: Selling? Get your free Home Value Report in minutes. Buying? Tell me what you're looking for.

data.title: About Jenise
bio: I'm Jenise Buckalew — a NJ State Licensed REALTOR®, proud mother of five, and an independent agent with Green Light Realty LLC. With over 20 years of experience and hundreds of successful transactions, I specialize in helping homeowners across Middlesex, Monmouth, and Ocean Counties get the best value for their biggest investment.

I'm a recurring NJ REALTORS® Circle of Excellence award winner with a perfect 5.0 Zillow rating. I believe every client deserves hands-on, personalized service — from a free professional CMA to expert home prep advice and professional photography. Whether you're buying your first home or selling a property you've owned for decades, I bring the same dedication to every transaction.
Green Light Realty LLC operates three offices — one in Ocean County and two in Middlesex County — giving my clients broad reach across Central New Jersey.
